subcodes.first_line: O My Leaf! Upon thee be My Glory! Thy letter hath reached Me, and the gaze of favor hath been directed towards it. Thou art ever remembered in the presence of this Wronged One [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا ورقتی علیک بهائی نامه ات رسید و طرف عنایت بان متوجه لازال نزد مظلوم مذکور
subcodes.subjects: @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @suffering and imprisonment, @permission for visit; pilgrimage, @consolation and comfort
